name: Lithium Corp
summary: Lithium Corporation (LTUM) is an exploration-stage mining company focused on identifying, acquiring, and exploring mineral properties, primarily lithium mineralization in Nevada and graphite and other critical metals in British Columbia. The company generates early-stage projects and seeks joint venture partners. It holds interests in properties including Fish Lake Valley, North Big Smoky, San Emidio, and BC graphite and REE prospects, and holds a 25% interest in Summa, LLC.

products.name: Fish Lake Valley lithium-in-brine property
products.description: Exploration-stage lithium brine property in Esmeralda County, Nevada; partially assigned to Morella Corporation with NSR retained.

products.name: North Big Smoky lithium-in-brine property
products.description: Exploration-stage lithium brine/clay property in Nevada optioned and ultimately assigned to Morella Corporation with NSR retained.

products.name: San Emidio lithium-in-brine prospect
products.description: Exploration-stage lithium brine property in Washoe County, Nevada; CSAMT survey completed, seeking joint venture partner.

products.name: BC Sugar flake graphite prospect
products.description: Exploration-stage flake graphite property located in British Columbia.

products.name: Yeehaw Titanium/REE prospect
products.description: Exploration-stage titanium and rare earth element property located in British Columbia.

products.name: Granby River Valley REE claims
products.description: Rare earth element claims in Granby River Valley, north of Grand Forks, BC; optioned to Ridgestone Mining Inc.

partnerships.description: Related party; assigned 100% interest in Fish Lake Valley peripheral claims and North Big Smoky property, retaining 3.5% NSR and ROFR.
Signed agreement for Surge to earn 80% in San Emidio property; Surge relinquished interest in Summer 2022.
Former optionee on Fish Lake Valley property; relinquished all interest in April 2019.
Related company via shared director/officer; optioned BC REE/Fluorspar property in December 2025, committed CDN $100,000 exploration in 2026.

partnerships.partner_name: All American Resources L.L.C. and TY & Sons Investments Inc.
partnerships.description: Co-members in Summa, LLC; Lithium Corporation holds 25% active managing member interest in Nevada fee title mining properties.
